name: & Olives
method: In a medium mixing dish, finely dice the tomato and bell pepper.
Transfer the olives, onions, and bell pepper to the bowl after halving
Chop and mince the spring onions, then blend them with canola oil,
oregano, and pepper in a mixing bowl. To mix, stir all together.
Over moderate flame, preheat a nonstick skillet.
In a medium mixing cup, break the eggs.
Add water and sprinkle with salt before whisking it together.
Sprinkle the oil around in the skillet to cover the rim.
Fill the skillet with the beaten egg.
Choose a combination of swirling and tossing to scramble the eggs,
being sure to pull in all of the ingredients from the pan's sides.
Heat the eggs until they are no runnier.
Switch off the heat in the skillet.
Cover tortillas with beaten egg, steamed vegetables, and feta
cheese on a level surface. Roll securely to close and eat!
